name: Deferred - Doubt - 1
description: First returns for religious uncertainty and spiritual doubt.

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Doubt first born in {origin} returned when certainty would have been more useful.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] The old uncertainty from {origin} came back in prayer, silence, or the inability to manage either.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer doubt 2 1d6] Questions first raised in {origin} proved patient enough to return uninvited.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Whatever you had once feared about faith in {origin} resumed its place at the edge of your thoughts.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Religious uncertainty from {origin} returned not as argument, but as weariness toward easy answers.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer doubt 2 1d6] Doubt from {origin} made devotion feel performative in moments when you most wished it would not.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] The old spiritual unease from {origin} returned through ritual that no longer fit your conscience cleanly.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Questions that began in {origin} acquired new force when your life demanded interpretation.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer doubt 2 1d6] Doubt from {origin} no longer shouted; it merely waited until silence gave it room.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] What {sourceTitle} had once stirred in your faith refused to remain resolved.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Spiritual uncertainty from {origin} returned at the exact hour your conscience needed a firmer shape.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer doubt 2 1d6] The old doubt from {origin} made every act of devotion feel slightly observed and slightly false.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] Questions of faith from {origin} returned as if they had merely been waiting for you to grow honest enough to hear them.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] The uncertainty born in {origin} proved more durable than the certainty that once tried to master it.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer doubt 2 1d6] Doubt from {origin} remained intimate enough to feel like part of your own voice.
results.name: doubt-1

results.description: [defer doubt 2 1d6] What faith had failed to settle in {origin} returned with no greater clarity and much greater urgency.
